tasks.instruction: On the insurance information pages, look up a silver-tier HMO plan that requires referrals for specialist visits, determine whether it is accepted and what specialist visit co-pay is listed, then send a billing message asking to confirm the co-pay for a new pediatric endocrinology patient visit under that plan.

expected_values.billing_contact_subject: Parent asking about BluePlus Silver HMO co-pay
expected_values.billing_contact_message: Hello, I have BluePlus Silver HMO and want to confirm the co-pay for a new pediatric endocrinology patient visit. The plan details mention a $25 specialist co-pay. Can you confirm this?

tasks.instruction: Use the prescription refill tool to request a refill of a once-daily thyroid hormone replacement tablet at a 50 mcg dose for an existing pediatric patient, with a quantity of 30 tablets, selecting the first pharmacy within 5 miles of ZIP code 10027 and the earliest available pickup time at or after 4:00 PM today before submitting the request with patient and guardian contact details.
